item.title: Forklifts Are Heavy
item.description: It looks simple—until you try to move one. What makes forklifts such a beast to recover?

media:content.media:title: Forklifts Are Heavy
media:content.media:description: It looks simple—until you try to move one. What makes forklifts such a beast to recover?

item.title: Getting Ready to Recover This Forklift
item.description: Preparation is key when forklifts get stuck. What’s the plan to bring this heavy machine back to safety?

media:content.media:title: Getting Ready to Recover This Forklift
media:content.media:description: Preparation is key when forklifts get stuck. What’s the plan to bring this heavy machine back to safety?

item.title: Western Star Tow Turns Into Rollover Rescue!
item.description: A routine tow takes a dangerous turn. How did a Western Star end up in a full rollover rescue?

media:content.media:title: Western Star Tow Turns Into Rollover Rescue!
media:content.media:description: A routine tow takes a dangerous turn. How did a Western Star end up in a full rollover rescue?

item.title: A Really Heavy Job Today
item.description: Some jobs push equipment to the limit. What made this recovery one of the heaviest challenges yet?

media:content.media:title: A Really Heavy Job Today
media:content.media:description: Some jobs push equipment to the limit. What made this recovery one of the heaviest challenges yet?

item.title: Big Truck Recovery
item.description: When a massive truck goes down, the recovery is anything but simple. What steps bring heavy machinery back on track?

media:content.media:title: Big Truck Recovery
media:content.media:description: When a massive truck goes down, the recovery is anything but simple. What steps bring heavy machinery back on track?

item.title: Double Duty: Forklifts & Fords at Once!
item.description: Two jobs collide—forklifts and Fords needing recovery at the same time. How do you juggle double trouble on the job site?

media:content.media:title: Double Duty: Forklifts & Fords at Once!
media:content.media:description: Two jobs collide—forklifts and Fords needing recovery at the same time. How do you juggle double trouble on the job site?

item.title: Semi vs SUV: Chaos on a Slippery Road!
item.description: A semi and SUV collide in treacherous conditions. What chain reaction of chaos unfolded on the slick roadway?

media:content.media:title: Semi vs SUV: Chaos on a Slippery Road!
media:content.media:description: A semi and SUV collide in treacherous conditions. What chain reaction of chaos unfolded on the slick roadway?

item.title: Vehicle Down for Recovery
item.description: See the moment a vehicle goes down, requiring careful recovery. How will the team get it back up?

media:content.media:title: Vehicle Down for Recovery
media:content.media:description: See the moment a vehicle goes down, requiring careful recovery. How will the team get it back up?

item.title: Curb Collision Moment
item.description: A driver hits the curb, leading to unexpected trouble. What happens next in this roadside mishap?

media:content.media:title: Curb Collision Moment
media:content.media:description: A driver hits the curb, leading to unexpected trouble. What happens next in this roadside mishap?
